characters.name: Amit Patel
characters.description: Amit PatelBiographyFull NameAmit PatelAliasesPatel(by friends)StatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesMaya Patel(wife)Addy Patel(daughter)Unnamed daughterUnnamed sonRomancesMaya Patel(wife)OccupationAnimal Control OfficerResidenceSeattle, Washington, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1,2, &3Episodes24First"Weasels and Ostriches"Last"Goats, Snakes and Dogs"Portrayed byRavi PatelAmit Patelis one of the deuteragonists of theFOXcomedy seriesAnimal Control. Amit sometimes struggles with authority in his family life but is a loving and caring parent. Amit

characters.name: Emily Price
characters.description: Emily PriceBiographyFull NameEmily PriceAliasesEmBirthNovember 20, 1986StatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed parentsRomancesRick Doyle(Ex-boyfriend)OccupationAnimal Control DirectorResidenceSeattle, Washington, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1,2, &3Episodes24First"Weasels and Ostriches"Last"Goats, Snakes and Dogs"Portrayed byVella LovellEmily Priceis the tritagonist of theFOXcomedy seriesAnimal Control. She is portrayed byVella Lovell. Emily is the good-natured director at the A.C. precinct. She often tries to improve her career and get a more well-paying job, but is constantly stone-walled byCommissioner Dudgeand the others do not want her to leave on account of how easy it is to take advantage of her. Emily is the good-natured director at the A.C. precinct. characters.name: Frank Shaw
characters.description: Frank ShawBiographyFull NameFrancis ShawAliasesFrankStatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesJimmy Shaw(father)Unnamed Mother †(deceased)Patrick Shaw(brother)Billy(cousin)OccupationAnimal Control OfficerPolice Officer(former)ResidenceSeattle, Washington, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1,2,3, &4Episodes38First"Weasels and Ostriches"Last"Donkeys and Weasels"Portrayed byJoel McHaleFrancis "Frank" Shawis the main protagonist of theFOXcomedy seriesAnimal Control. He is portrayed byJoel McHale. A former cop, Frank tried to expose corruption in his department, but his efforts got him fired, which may explain why he’s so cynical and curmudgeonly. Frank is an opinionated, eccentric, disillusioned and emotionally distant Senior Animal Control Officer who may not have gone to college but still the most well-read person in the room. He has an almost superhuman ability to understand animals. Humans...not so much.

characters.name: Fred Taylor
characters.description: Fred "Shred" TaylorBiographyFull NameFred TaylorAliasesShred(by friends)StatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed parentsRomancesEmily Price(interest)Camila(ex-girlfriend)Isabelle(girlfriend)OccupationAnimal Control OfficerResidenceSeattle, Washington, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1,2,3, &4Episodes38First"Weasels and Ostriches"Last"Donkeys and Weasels"Portrayed byMichael RowlandFred "Shred" Tayloris one of the deuteragonists of theFOXcomedy seriesAnimal Control. He is portrayed byMichael Rowland. An idealistic amateur Animal Control officer and a former professional snowboarder. His unbound idealism causes him to deflect the negativity that his precinct often dishes out, but just barely. An idealistic amateur Animal Control officer and a former professional snowboarder. His unbound idealism causes him to deflect the negativity that his precinct often dishes out, but just barely.

characters.name: Maya Patel
characters.description: Maya PatelBiographyFull NameMaya PatelAliasesMaya(by everyone)Mom(by her children)StatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesAmit Patel(husband)Addy Patel(daughter)Unnamed daughterUnnamed sonRomancesAmit Patel(husband)ResidenceSeattle, Washington, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1Episodes3First"Weasels and Ostriches"Last"Dogs and Geese"Portrayed byKalyn MilesMaya Patelis a recurring character in theFOXcomedy seriesAnimal Control. She is portrayed byKalyn Miles. Maya is married toAmit Patel, with whom she has three young children. Although her husband struggles with some aspects of parenting young girls, Maya is happy in her relationship and with her family.

characters.name: Rick Doyle
characters.description: Rick DoyleBiographyFull NameRichard DoyleAliasesRick(by everyone)StatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed parentsRomancesEmily Price(Ex-girlfriend)Anna(girlfriend)OccupationRetiredResidenceSeattle, Washington, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1&2Episodes6First"Dogs and Bears and Minks"Last"TBA"Portrayed byKevin BigleyRick Doyleis a recurring character in theFOXcomedy seriesAnimal Control. He is portrayed byKevin Bigley. Rick is the previous director of the A.C. precinct andFrank's former partner. He left after he was viciously mauled by a mink which resulted in the loss of one of his ears as well as a giant settlement from the city. He has a very positive personality and was well-liked by the staff.Emilyseeks his advice on her new position and as a result he becomes a more frequent guest at the precinct due to a his growing crush and eventual relationship with her. She is portrayed byGrace Palmer. Victoria is a street-smart Animal Control officer from New Zealand andAmit's partner. She is often seen helping Amit come out of his shell in order to do his job.
